name: Maryam Al-Maliki
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم مريم 👋 نلاحظ أنك حاضرة بانتظام وهذا رائع جداً! 💪 لكن نريد مساعدتك لتحسين درجات الاختبار - عندك 6 أيام قبل الاختبار القادم، هل تحتاجين أي دعم أو شرح لأي مواضيع؟
action: Call or message Maryam today to introduce yourself, assess her learning challenges for the upcoming quiz, and offer targeted study support for the next 6 days.
reasoning: Maryam has never been contacted despite consistent attendance and a below-passing quiz score, creating an urgent intervention window. With 6 days until the next quiz, early facilitator engagement can help her improve before the next assessment.
